# issue

**Instance Property**

The issue that fulfills the expected failure.

## Declaration

```swift
var issue: XCTIssue { get }
```

```swift
@NSCopying var issue: XCTIssueReference { get }
```

## Detailing Expected Failure

- **failureReason**: An optional string that describes why the test expects a failure.

items.description: An optional string that describes why the test expects a failure.
